query:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.format,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games g WHERE g.tournamentId = t.id) as total_games,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games g WHERE g.tournamentId = t.id AND g.groupName IS NOT NULL AND g.groupName != '') as games_with_group,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games g WHERE g.tournamentId = t.id AND g.phase IS NOT NULL AND g.phase != '') as games_with_phase,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT g.groupName ORDER BY g.groupName SEPARATOR ', ') FROM games g WHERE g.tournamentId = t.id AND g.groupName IS NOT NULL AND g.groupName != '') as group_names,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT g.phase ORDER BY g.phase SEPARATOR ', ') FROM games g WHERE g.tournamentId = t.id AND g.phase IS NOT NULL AND g.phase != '') as phases
FROM tournaments t
ORDER BY t.id DESC
LIMIT 5;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games g WHERE g.tournamentId = t.id AND g.groupName IS NOT NULL AND g.groupName != '') as games_with_group,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games g WHERE g.tournamentId = t.id AND g.phase IS NOT NULL AND g.phase != '') as games_with_phase,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT g.groupName ORDER BY g.groupName SEPARATOR ', ') FROM games g WHERE g.tournamentId = t.id AND g.groupName IS NOT NULL AND g.groupName != '') as group_names,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT g.phase ORDER BY g.phase SEPARATOR ', ') FROM games g WHERE g.tournamentId = t.id AND g.phase IS NOT NULL AND g.phase != '') as phases
FROM tournaments t
ORDER BY t.id DESC
